name: Shiranui Style Success
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>不知火</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しらぬい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>流</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>才</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>華</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>陣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon 1 Zombie monster from your hand, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Zombie monster you control; that Zombie monster is unaffected by card effects this turn, except its own. You can only use 1 "Shiranui Style Success" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Special Summon 1 Zombie monster from your hand, but banish it when it leaves the field. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Zombie monster you control; that Zombie monster is unaffected by card effects this turn, except its own. You can only use 1 "Shiranui Style Success" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

banished: Banishes other cards when they leave the field
Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
